title: Wholesome Dense Filipino Shrimp Stew
description: A hearty shrimp stew bursting with citrusy brightness and savory depth, seasoned with shallots and garlic, and simmered until thick and comforting.

ingredients.name: lemon zest and juice from 1 lemon

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the sliced shallots and minced garlic, sautéing until fragrant and translucent.
Pour in the water and shrimp stock, then stir in the fish sauce.
Bring the mixture to a simmer, then add the shrimp and lemon zest.
Cook the shrimp for 3 to 4 minutes until they turn pink and opaque.
Squeeze in the lemon juice, season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Let the stew simmer for an additional 5 minutes to meld the flavors.
Remove the pot from heat, stir in the chopped cilantro, and let it rest for 2 minutes.
Serve hot, spooning the dense broth and shrimp into bowls.
